text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 29 

HEARIM_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: Sensory — Deafness and Hearing Impairment First Ever Occurrence Date — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for a sensory (deafness and 
hearing) impairment. 

The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have never had the condition.
